manage.title: Symlink Management
manage.repair_subtitle: Grouped by task; select a group to batch process
manage.source_update_hint: Update boundary: automatic only when provenance contains a replayable update route; otherwise best-effort or unknown.
manage.already_exists_at_agent: This Agent already has this Skill
manage.sync_scope_tip: Sync {skill} from {agent} to library (this one agent only)
manage.overwrite_confirm_message: {skill} in {agent} differs from the library version. Continuing will overwrite the library with this Agent version and replace the Agent copy with a link.
manage.no_batch_actions: No actions available for selected agents
manage.conflict_plan_overwrite_library: Overwrite the library with the {source} version.
manage.conflict_plan_link_selected: Replace the original copy in {source} with a link to the library.
manage.conflict_plan_align_same: Replace {count} same-content agent copies with links.
manage.conflict_plan_replace_different: Replace {count} different-content agent copies with links to the library.
manage.internal_conflict_remove_others: Move {count} other real copies in this Agent to trash; the selected path is kept.
manage.internal_conflict_no_library: This will not import to the library or create library links.
manage.internal_conflict_import_action: Import to library and link all
manage.conflict_use_resolution: Expand details and choose the canonical version in the conflict resolution panel
manage.batch_panel_steps: Pick skills × pick agents → preview → run
manage.batch_panel_summary: Will run {exec}, conflict {conflict}, skipped {skipped}, blocked {blocked}, needs import {import}
manage.batch_panel_resolve_conflict_tip: Open this skill's conflict resolution panel
manage.batch_panel_needs_import_tip: This skill is not in the library and the target agent has no real copy. Import it via some agent first, then link it to this agent.
manage.batch_panel_conflict_confirm_msg: {count} operations will conflict (the library already has a same-named skill with different content). Running will fail those. Confirm to run all checked items; conflicts will appear in the error detail. Or cancel and uncheck the conflicts.
manage.batch_panel_col_tip: Click header to select this agent column
manage.batch_panel_row_tip: Click header to select this skill row
manage.batch_panel_no_selection: Select at least one operation to run
manage.batch_dry_run_counts: run {execute}, link {link}, sync {sync}, relink {relink}, clean {clean}, skip {skipped}, conflict {conflict}, blocked {blocked}
manage.batch_panel_reason_conflict: The library already has a same-name skill with different content
manage.batch_panel_reason_needs_import: Not in the library; import first
manage.batch_result_counts: success {success}, failed {failed}, warnings {warning}, skipped {skipped}, conflict {conflict}, blocked {blocked}

skills.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete skill "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
skills.delete_library_confirm: Delete "{name}" from the library? This removes the ~/.vibe-skills/ library copy and cleans Agent links that point to it; project/external source files are not deleted.
skills.no_skills_hint: Add SKILL.md files to ~/.vibe-skills/ directory, or click install to import
skills.install_hint: Directory must contain a SKILL.md file

agents.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"?
agents.name: Agent Name
agents.name_hint: Displayed as a tag on skill cards
agents.detect_dir_hint: Used to detect whether the tool exists; it can differ from the skills directory.
agents.skills_dir_hint: Use the skills directory that the target agent actually reads
agents.additional_scan_dirs_placeholder: One read-only discovery directory per line
agents.additional_scan_dirs_hint: These directories are scanned for discovery only and are not default write targets.
agents.path_config_hint: Detection directory checks tool presence; Skills directory is the sync target; additional scan dirs are read-only discovery.
agents.runtime_hint: QS-Vibe can manage this directory, but the agent may still need its own reload or configuration to recognize new skills.
agents.directory_exists_hint: The skills directory exists. This does not guarantee the agent has loaded it.
agents.directory_tool_hint: Tool directory: {detectDir}. Skills directory: {skillsDir}. Directory presence does not guarantee runtime loading.
agents.directory_missing_hint: The skills directory was not found on disk.
agents.common_source_hint: Common skills directory. Whether it is loaded depends on each agent's rules.

history.replaced_with_library: Replaced {skill} in {agent} with the library version
history.clear_confirm: Clear all history? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.vibe_skills_path_hint: Where skill data is stored, default: ~/.vibe-skills/
settings.migrate_confirm: Migrate data from old directory to new location?
settings.project_roots_hint: One project root per line. QS-Vibe will scan .codex/skills, .agents/skills, and skills under each root.
settings.project_roots_empty: No project roots yet. Add one to enable project source scanning.
settings.project_roots_suggestion_hint: Detected by current folder and project conventions
